Ad Text:
A leading wealth management firm focused on high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth clients is seeking an experienced Investment Research professional with a strong track record across Alternative Investments.

This is a rare opportunity to play a key role in building and evolving a sophisticated alternatives platform, working closely with senior investment leadership to identify, assess, and implement best-in-class private-market opportunities for clients.

The role will suit an experienced investment professional with deep expertise in alternatives, strong manager networks, and the ability to communicate complex investment ideas clearly to internal stakeholders and clients.
  
The Opportunity
As a senior member of the CIO team, you will lead research, due diligence and implementation across a broad range of alternative asset classes, including:
(Private Equity, Private Credit, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Property).
You will also act as a trusted internal adviser, helping lift capability across the business while building strong relationships with fund managers, advisers and clients.
  
Key Responsibilities
Investment Research & Due Diligence

Lead end-to-end research and manager due diligence across alternative investments
Assess return drivers, risk, liquidity, governance and portfolio fit
Prepare high-quality investment papers and recommendations
Source and evaluate new investment opportunities through market networks
Monitor macro and thematic trends impacting private markets
Stakeholder & Client Engagement

Present investment ideas and market views to advisers, committees and clients
Represent the CIO team in internal and external meetings
Maintain strong relationships with leading alternative fund managers
Attend relevant industry events and forums
Platform Development & Governance

Support the growth of the alternatives platform and product offering
Enhance research frameworks and due diligence processes
Monitor approved investments and escalate risks where required
Contribute to best-practice governance and investment oversight
  
We are seeking a commercially minded investment professional with genuine alternatives capability.
Key requirements include:

8+ years’ experience in investments, wealth management, funds management or private markets
Strong experience across private equity, private credit, infrastructure, property or venture capital
Proven capability in manager research, due diligence and portfolio construction
Strong relationships across fund managers and market participants
Excellent communication and presentation skills
Ability to influence senior stakeholders and engage sophisticated clients
CFA or relevant tertiary qualifications highly regarded
  
Why This Role?

Join a respected wealth manager with a premium high-net-worth client base
Work directly with senior investment leadership
Build and shape a growing alternatives capability
Strong culture of collaboration, partnership and excellence
Genuine long-term career opportunity in a growing segment of the market
  
For a confidential discussion, please contact Kaizen Recruitment or apply via the link.
